div.div: No structured milestones v1 — partial completion = partial invoices. Scope/value/validity amendable only until the first invoice is submitted (409 after); cumulative invoiced tracked vs value (over-invoicing warns/blocks).

div.div: State machine: submitted → verified (designated employee) → approved | rejected → paid. Approval = majority of the designated EC subset. A single rejection is terminal (discards approvals); override = majority of the ENTIRE EC; resubmission = fresh invoice via resubmission_of (closes the override window). Payment posts Expense Ledger + Bank/Cash Book.
